Sponsorships / Fatal Grips

Fatal Grips

controllers
Affiliate
10% Commission
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Fatal Grips sells premium, high-performance controller grips designed for precision and comfort.

Affiliate Program

  • Commission: 10% for each sale

  • Cookie duration: 30 days

  • Free merchandise every 4 sales with your discount code Throughout the application you’ll need to provide:

  • Social channels

  • Your favorite Fatal Grips product

  • Which gaming platform you use
